finding_results.notes: Replaced indirect swearing summaries with direct quoted profanity at headache escalation, hemorrhage restraint, and ambulance-threshold logistics beats.

Reduced motif over-signaling by removing explicit numbers/sequence framing at three cited beats and converting them to observable control behavior, while retaining one explicit ledger line at the close.

summary: Implemented the chapter-14 structural/craft pass by de-euphemizing required profanity beats and tightening the ending control motif cluster to one explicit ledger metaphor with surrounding pressure conveyed through concrete action.
